name: The Bank Of Glen Burnie
description_short: Community bank serving Anne Arundel County with 6 branches, offering personal and business banking, credit cards, loans, and digital banking services.
description_long: The Bank of Glen Burnie is a community bank that has been operating for 76 years, building relationships and strengthening the Anne Arundel County area. The bank employs 68 staff members across 6 convenient branch locations and maintains FDIC insurance protection with Bank NMLS 478089. Their tagline 'Bank SMART. Bank LOCAL.' reflects their positioning as a local alternative to larger national banks. The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial products including consumer and business credit cards with rewards, personal and business loans, mortgages and home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), high-yield Money Market ADVANTAGE accounts, Smart Growth Flex CDs, and SBA loans for small businesses. They also provide cash management tools for businesses including Positive Pay, ACH Manager, and Wire Manager, plus consumer digital services like mobile banking, mobile deposit, online banking, and Zelle integration for peer-to-peer money transfers. The Bank of Glen Burnie differentiates itself through personalized customer service, community engagement, and local lending decisions. They emphasize their neighborhood presence and customer-first approach whether customers visit branches or use digital banking products. The bank highlights competitive rates and flexible terms tailored to local business needs, positioning themselves as offering 'big bank options with local, personalized customer service.' As a community bank, The Bank of Glen Burnie is best suited for customers prioritizing local relationships and personalized service over the broadest product selection or lowest rates available nationwide. Their geographic footprint is limited to Anne Arundel County, Maryland, which may restrict accessibility for customers outside this region. For those seeking a traditional banking relationship with community involvement, the bank provides solid fundamentals, though customers should compare rates and terms with larger institutions before committing.
services: Consumer credit cards with rewards programs
Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOCs) and Home Equity Loans
SBA loans for small business financing
Smart Growth Flex CDs with variable yields
Mobile banking app with mobile deposit capability
Online banking with bill pay and Zelle integration
Business cash management tools (Positive Pay, ACH Manager, Wire Manager)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with 76 years of operating history and established community presence
6 convenient branch locations across Anne Arundel County for in-person service
Mobile deposit feature available through Android and iPhone apps for check deposits
Competitive business lending with local decision-making and SBA loan options
Zelle integration in personal online banking for fast peer-to-peer money transfers
Advanced cash management tools for businesses (Positive Pay, ACH Manager, Wire Manager)
High-yield Money Market ADVANTAGE accounts and Smart Growth Flex CDs for savings
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Anne Arundel County, Maryland only
No specific rates or APR information disclosed on website for comparison shopping
Smaller institution with 68 employees may have limited product depth versus national banks
Website content does not mention CD rates, account minimum balances, or specific promotional terms
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or trust services beyond basic banking

contact.address: 101 Crain Hwy S, Glen Burnie, MD 21061

best_for: Anne Arundel County residents seeking personalized local banking relationships
Small business owners needing flexible commercial loans with local decision-makers
Homeowners looking for local mortgage and HELOC options with community bank service
Customers prioritizing branch accessibility and face-to-face customer service over digital-only banking
diagnosis: The Bank of Glen Burnie is ideal for Anne Arundel County residents and business owners who value local relationships, personalized service, and community engagement over the broadest product selection or lowest rates available nationally. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Maryland's Anne Arundel County and lack of published rate information, requiring prospective customers to visit branches or contact directly for current terms and pricing.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 101 Crain Hwy S, Glen Burnie, MD 21061
